title: 皐月賞の後に・二代の雪辱

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright manages to win the Satsuki Sho, the
first race of the Triple Crown. She's elated to
have won and overwrite a bitter memory for
Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While touched to learn the reason behind the
victory, Mejiro Ryan voices her preference that
Mejiro Bright run for herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She explains the reason she lost that race was
because of the weight of the Mejiro family's
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright smiles at the thought of running for
her own sake. With that, we set our sights on the
Japanese Derby.
